summary: An informational graphic sequence ('GLOBAL ENTRY Machines' / 'CBP STREAMLINES TRAVEL') using stock photos of airport Global Entry kiosks inside colorful FIFA World Cup 2026 / CBP-branded frames, promoting Global Entry enrollment. No audio and no cinematic editing — a plain promo graphic, not a produced music-driven video.
notable_text: GLOBAL ENTRY Machines; CBP STREAMLINES TRAVEL; Global Entry Mobile App; FIFA WORLD CUP 2026; tweet: 'Want to clear customs quicker than a corner kick? Get Global Entry!'
